auth.name: Name
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.checkEmail: Please check your email to verify your account, then sign in.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.linkExpiredDesc: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset.
auth.invalidResetLink: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new one.
auth.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to reset your password.
auth.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
auth.enterCodeError: Please enter the code from your email
auth.passwordUpdatedSignIn: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.

home.noUpcomingDesc: Create a match offer and share it with other coaches to schedule your next game
home.noRecentDesc: Your match offers and booking activity will appear here

manage.title: My Match Offers
manage.noOffersDesc: Create your first match offer and share it with other coaches to start scheduling games
manage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this offer? This cannot be undone.

create.title: Create Match Offer
create.tapToAdd: Tap the + button to add a time slot
create.endTimeHint: End time will be {{minutes}} minutes after start time
create.addAtLeastOneSlot: Please add at least one time slot
create.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
create.approvalSent: Your match offer has been created! An approval request has been sent to your approver. The share link will be available once approved.
create.unknownError: Unknown error occurred. Check your database connection.

offer.title: Match Offer
offer.selectSlotDesc: Select a time slot that works for your team
offer.closedMessage: This match offer is no longer accepting bookings.
offer.notFoundDesc: This match offer does not exist or has been removed.
offer.slotUnavailable: Sorry, this slot has been taken by another team. Please go back and select another available slot.

book.title: Book Match Slot
book.confirmedDesc: Your match has been booked. The host coach will be notified.

approve.title: Approve Match Slots
approve.headerDesc: Review and approve or reject each time slot individually. You can also use the bulk actions at the bottom.
approve.approveSlotDesc: Are you sure you want to approve "{{time}}"? This will confirm this time slot for the match.
approve.rejectSlotDesc: Are you sure you want to reject "{{time}}"? This time slot will not be available for booking.
approve.approveAllDesc: This will approve all {{count}} pending slot(s). Continue?
approve.rejectAllDesc: This will reject all {{count}} pending slot(s) and cancel the match offer. Continue?
approve.allApprovedDesc: All {{count}} slot(s) have been approved. The match offer is now ready to share.
approve.allRejectedDesc: All slots have been rejected. The match offer has been cancelled.
approve.allProcessed: All slots have already been processed.
approve.notFoundDesc: This approval request does not exist or has expired.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.allClearDesc: When coaches request match approval and list your email, they'll appear here for you to review.

detail.title: Match Details
detail.notStarted: Match hasn't started yet. You can add the result after the game.
detail.awaitingBookingDesc: Share your match link so other coaches can book this slot.
detail.slotRejectedDesc: This time slot was rejected and is no longer available.

profile.title: Profile
profile.logOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

share.linkCopiedDesc: Share this link with other coaches to let them book a slot.

onboarding.createDesc: Set up a match offer with your age group, format, location, and available time slots. Then send it to your approver.
onboarding.shareDesc: Once approved, share the link with other coaches via WhatsApp, message, or email. They pick a slot and book instantly.
onboarding.trackDesc: View your matches on the calendar, get reminders before kick-off, record results, and track your season.
